tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, significant proteinuria, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, presence of glucose, bilirubin, and ketones), suggesting impaired renal function with possible nephrotic features. HbA1c is low, ruling out chronic hyperglycemia. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend further nephrological evaluation for possible glomerular disease and assessment of underlying causes.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Nonproliferative retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
